item.title: Ford Motor Company: STEERING Recall (2024 ford f-150)
item.summary: Ford Motor Company (Ford) is recalling certain 2024 F-150 vehicles. The steering gear assembly may have been assembled with an incorrect rack, which can cause the gears to fracture.
item.affectedPeople: A fractured steering gear can cause the steering to bind or lock, resulting in a loss of steering control and increasing the risk of a crash.
item.remedy: Dealers will replace the steering gear assembly, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed February 19, 2025. Owners may contact Ford customer service at 1-866-436-7332. Ford's number for this recall is 25S04.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
